productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Navy Blue Trouser
description: Composition Navy blue striped trouser made of a cotton blend fabric, has a flat front, pockets on the sides, with a concealed zipper pocket on the right seam, two pockets at the back with button closures, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fitting Smart Wash care Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Keep your wallet and other essentials safe with this trouser from peter england's Secured Pocket collection. Designed for the busy executive who travels miles on end, this trouser comes with a concealed spacious zippered pocket that helps you safekeep your wallet. Crafted from a soft cotton blend fabric and with smart cuts, this trouser offers exemplary comfort. Team it with crisp formals, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
